fast.$description: Fast — quick feedback on small elements (hovers, toggles, focus rings). DRAFT pending design review.

base.$description: Base — the default duration for most UI transitions. DRAFT pending design review.

slow.$description: Slow — larger surfaces entering or leaving (modals, drawers, sheets). DRAFT pending design review.

standard.$description: Standard ease-in-out — the default curve for elements moving within the viewport. DRAFT pending design review.

decelerate.$description: Decelerate (ease-out) — elements entering the screen, fast then settling. DRAFT pending design review.

accelerate.$description: Accelerate (ease-in) — elements leaving the screen, building speed as they exit. DRAFT pending design review.
